scenes.title: Cover Hook
scenes.narration: Three steps. One elegant workflow. Here is how it works.
scenes.visual_prompt: Deep charcoal-black background, near-zero ambient light. A single horizontal hairline in electric indigo stretches across the center of the frame. Above it, a large bold sans-serif logotype fades in. Below it, a concise subtitle appears. Minimal, editorial, premium.
scenes.staging_notes: Hairline draws left-to-right first, then headline drops in with a fast reveal, subtitle fades up after a half-beat pause. Hold two beats, then wipe right.
on_screen_text: Three steps to go from idea to finished video.

scenes.title: Roadmap Overview
scenes.narration: The whole process fits into three clean moves: capture intent, draft the storyboard, then generate and render.
scenes.visual_prompt: Dark editorial environment, near-black background with a faint deep-blue gradient at the edges. Three numbered nodes arranged horizontally across the center, connected by a thin glowing line. Each node is a softly lit circle with a step number inside. Node labels appear below each circle in clean white sans-serif. Crisp, spacious, confident.
scenes.staging_notes: Nodes reveal left-to-right in sequence, each with a subtle pop scale-in. The connecting line draws progressively as each node appears. Labels fade up beneath each node on a slight delay. Keep the layout airy — plenty of negative space.

scenes.title: Step One — Capture Intent
scenes.narration: It starts with intent. You describe what you want, who it is for, and what it needs to say.
scenes.visual_prompt: Near-black background with a subtle deep-indigo vignette. Left side holds a large, glowing step indicator: the numeral '01' in oversized editorial type, slightly translucent. Right side holds a short two-line descriptor in clean white type. A faint animated cursor blink sits at the end of the descriptor line, implying active input. Premium, focused.
scenes.staging_notes: Step number slams in first with a brief scale punch, then the label slides up from below, then the descriptor fades in. Cursor blinks two or three times before scene holds. Crisp and fast.
on_screen_text: Describe the goal, audience, and message.

scenes.title: What Intent Looks Like
scenes.narration: A goal, an audience, a tone. That is all it takes to get started.
scenes.visual_prompt: Dark background, deep charcoal. Three stacked horizontal rows, each a subtly glowing dark card. Each card holds a left-aligned label in cool gray and a right-aligned value in bright white. Cards are spaced with generous vertical breathing room. Thin indigo accent line runs along the left edge of each card. Minimal, data-forward.
scenes.staging_notes: Cards cascade in from bottom to top, each staggered by a quarter beat. Label appears first in gray, then value sweeps in from the left on a half-beat delay. Feels like filling out a form — deliberate and satisfying.
on_screen_text: Busy operators who need it fast.

scenes.title: Step Two — Draft the Storyboard
scenes.narration: Next, the director takes over. It reads your intent and drafts a full storyboard, scene by scene.
scenes.visual_prompt: Near-black background with a very faint charcoal grid texture. Left side: large glowing step indicator '02' in oversized editorial type, slightly translucent. Right side: short label and descriptor in clean white sans-serif. Soft indigo edge glow on the left. Focused, editorial.
scenes.staging_notes: Same punchy reveal rhythm as Step One — number slams in, label slides up, descriptor fades. Consistent motion language reinforces the system feel.
on_screen_text: The director structures your story automatically.

scenes.title: What the Director Produces
scenes.narration: Narration, visuals, pacing, overlays — structured and ready to render.
scenes.visual_prompt: Dark editorial background, deep charcoal. A simulated scene card layout: two columns of two cards each, arranged in a soft grid. Each card is a rounded dark rectangle with a faint inner glow. Each card holds a short label at the top in cool gray and a single-line descriptor below in bright white. Thin indigo rule under each label. Clean, product-forward.
scenes.staging_notes: Cards reveal in reading order — top-left, top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right — each with a quick fade-and-rise. Feels like watching a storyboard populate in real time.

scenes.title: Step Three — Generate, Refine, Render
scenes.narration: Then you generate, refine if needed, and render. Most of the time, one pass is all it takes.
scenes.visual_prompt: Near-black background, deep-indigo vignette at edges. Left side: large glowing step indicator '03' in oversized editorial type. Right side: label and descriptor in clean white sans-serif. Soft warm-gold accent glow instead of indigo — marking this as the final payoff step. Premium, resolved.
scenes.staging_notes: Same rhythmic reveal as Steps One and Two, but the accent color shifts to warm gold to signal arrival at the finish. Number punches in, label rises, descriptor fades. Hold a beat longer than the prior steps — let it breathe.

scenes.title: One-Pass Power
scenes.narration: The whole system is built so the first draft is already close. Refinement is an option, not a requirement.
scenes.visual_prompt: Dark background, near-black with a subtle warm-to-cool gradient bloom at center. A single large centered statement in bold white editorial type. Below it, a smaller supporting line in cool gray. Generous whitespace. No clutter. Feels like a manifesto line.
scenes.staging_notes: Headline types on character by character at a confident pace, then supporting line fades up after a half-beat. No animation noise — just the text arriving with quiet authority.
on_screen_text: Refine only if you need to.

scenes.title: Full Workflow Reprise
scenes.narration: Capture intent, draft the storyboard, then generate and render. Three steps, one smooth run.
scenes.visual_prompt: Deep charcoal-black background. The three-node horizontal diagram returns, but now all three nodes are fully lit and glowing — indigo for One and Two, warm gold for Three. The connecting line glows end-to-end. Labels are bold and fully visible beneath each node. Confident, complete, satisfying.
scenes.staging_notes: All three nodes appear simultaneously this time — no stagger — as a single resolved system. The connecting line pulses once with a soft glow before settling. Feels like a checklist completed. Hold on the full diagram for a confident beat.

scenes.title: Closing Statement
scenes.narration: Simple, elegant, and built for operators who do not have time to waste. That is the workflow.
scenes.visual_prompt: Near-black background with a very faint indigo-to-charcoal radial gradient glowing from the center. A single large centered closing line in bold premium white type. Below it, a hairline separator, then a smaller tagline in cool gray italics. Quiet luxury finish — like the last frame of a high-end product film.
scenes.staging_notes: Headline fades up slowly and cleanly — no punch, no type-on — just a graceful arrival. Hairline draws in after a beat, then tagline fades below it. Hold for two full beats before a slow fade to black. The video should feel like it ends with intention, not like it stops.
on_screen_text: Built for operators who move fast.
